prompt: Fine-tune mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3 on a conversational JSONL at ./data/chats.jsonl where each line has a 'messages' array of {role, content} dicts. Apply the tokenizer's chat template to format each conversation. Use LoRA rank 16 alpha 16 on q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/o_proj. Use TRL SFTTrainer with packing=False, max_seq_length=2048, 1 epoch, batch size 2, lr 2e-4, bf16. Save to ./out/mistral-chat.

criteria.description: Runs 1 epoch on 10 synthetic samples without raising

reference_solution:
from datasets import load_dataset
from peft import LoraConfig, PeftModel
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
from trl import SFTConfig, SFTTrainer

model_id = 'mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3'
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
if tokenizer.pad_token is None:
    tokenizer.pad_token = tokenizer.eos_token
model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id, torch_dtype='bfloat16')

ds = load_dataset('json', data_files='./data/chats.jsonl', split='train')
def apply_tpl(row):
    return {'text': tokenizer.apply_chat_template(
        row['messages'], tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=False)}
ds = ds.map(apply_tpl)

lora = LoraConfig(r=16, lora_alpha=16, lora_dropout=0.05,
                  target_modules=['q_proj','k_proj','v_proj','o_proj'],
                  bias='none', task_type='CAUSAL_LM')
args = SFTConfig(output_dir='./out/mistral-chat',
                 per_device_train_batch_size=2, num_train_epochs=1,
                 learning_rate=2e-4, bf16=True, max_seq_length=2048,
                 packing=False, save_strategy='no')
trainer = SFTTrainer(model=model, args=args, train_dataset=ds,
                     peft_config=lora, tokenizer=tokenizer)
trainer.train()
trainer.model.save_pretrained('./out/mistral-chat')
_ = PeftModel.from_pretrained(model, './out/mistral-chat')
